title: cattleya × veriflora
intro: Cattleya × veriflora, also known as the orchid, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross-breeding of two Cattleya species. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cattleya × veriflora include reducing stress, improving respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion for herbal use, with its leaves and flowers being used separately for different purposes.
